title: Sakura: Haru no Gensou
synopsis: A visually artistic animation with no real story. It follows a pair of butterflies as they drift past various beautiful depictions of people and animals. (Source: AniDB)

title: Nandarou
synopsis: A short TV advertising spot featuring a small green pig with enormous eyes. The title Nandarou implies that even its creators didn't really know what kind of creature it was supposed to be. However, NTV (Nihon TV) chose it as their station's mascot. (Source: ANN, Nausicaa.net)

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

title: Mianhada Saranghanda
synonyms: Sorry I Love You: Between of One Year
synopsis: When hit KBS drama I'm Sorry, I Love You aired in 2004, it recorded high TV ratings, won the acclaim of critics, and quickly became one of the flagbearers of the Korean Wave. The tragic love story of Mu Hyeok (So Ji Sub of What Happened in Bali) and Eun Chae (Yim Soo Jung of Lump Sugar and I'm a Cyborg, But That's OK) made stars out of its leads and attracted an enormous fanbase throughout Asia. Two years later, G&G Entertainment released a 35-minute animated version of the drama, Between of One Year, consisting of highlights from the drama and new scenes dealing with the final moments of Eun Chae and Mu Hyeok's relationship. The script was supervised by the writer of the original live-action drama, Lee Kyung Hee.

title: The Curlydog Story
synopsis: A little girl plays with a curly dog before heading to bed. Once asleep the curls fall apart and the girl's teddy bear comes to life to give the dog a make over to bring the curls back.

title: The Tree of Courage
synopsis: An adaptation of a popular children's story by Okamoto Tadanari using a traditional storytelling style of narration. [Source: MAL rewrite]

title: Bottom Biting Bug 3
synopsis: Season 3 of the gag comedy about Oshiri Kajiri Mushi XVIII, a 10-year-old insect who goes to Biting School to inherit his family's Biting Shop business. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: SF Saiyuuki Starzinger (Movie)
titleNative: ＳＦ西遊記 スタージンガー
synopsis: Princess Aurora, the only survivor of her planet destroyed by evil mutants, is resolved to put an end to the mutant menace in the galaxy along with three enhanced human cyborgs Jesse Dart, Porkos and Aramus, she travels space in the Cosmos Queen to the Dekkos System to fight the final battle. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: A Day after a Hundred Years
titleEnglish: A Day after a Hundred Years
synopsis: Mr. Ogino should have died during the war but his spirit was brought back to life by the power of science. He sees the world 100 years later during the year 2032 lead by one of his descendants. They decide to take a trip to Mars too and the ship malfunctions, because a spirit of the past was on the ship, it went out of control trying to reach Buddha's paradise instead. Shigeji Ogino is the director if this film, he used himself as the protagonist and even included real life footage of himself as well.

title: Princess Army: Wedding Combat
titleNative: ぷりんせすARMY - ウェディング★COMBAT -
synopsis: The story is about Aida Nonoka who is rescued from a drunken attacker by a judoist. She then resolves to become as good as her savior, hoping that one day to recognize him by the scar on his back. She then transferred into a new high school where she meets two older boys who could possibly the person to whom she owes her life and to give her heart. (Source: AniDB)

title: Greed
synopsis: To succeed to his father, Lid Kail sets out a journey to defeat the incarnation of the evil that seems to dominate the world. Longn and Mimau also began to journey to achieve his father’s will. On their way, Key and Bagda join them. They overcome some difficulties, and finally they met Vaii, the evil. They managed to beat Vaii, but it still doesn't solve their problem....

title: Chubby Girlfriend ＆ Pity Boyfriend
titleRomaji: Maarui Kanojo to Zannen na Kareshi
titleNative: まぁるい彼女と残念な彼氏
synopsis: The romantic comedy follows Mariko, a plus-sized nurse who loves to eat. Having no love experience, she thinks her life is devoid of love, until she meets a handsome man named Nagi at a group date that she is invited to. Nagi then asks her out on a date. (Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

title: Midnight Crazy Trail
synopsis: Shout and Crunchy are "trash throw away-ers" who work in the dead of night. Makina is a 16-year-old witch who has come to the world of humans and to London to study for one year about how to become a proper bride. But Makina searches for Shout and Crunchy, and begs them to throw away her "Witch's Book." Truthfully, Makina wants to quit being a witch and become a normal girl, and the book is just a hindrance. But the book is not something one can simply just throw away. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Fantasia Sango - Realm of Legends
titleNative: 幻想三國誌 -天元霊心記

Together the heroes unveil an insidious conspiracy while sharing the joys and sorrows of battling a mysterious organization intent on tearing them and the kingdoms apart. (Source: Funimation)
